description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Three orchestrator changes: (a) wire EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 into collect_bindings at the per-layer extract_realized_by/1 site (subject layer + each requirement layer); (b) add post-concat dedup on the api_boundary tier flat list (Enum.uniq_by(& &1.mfa)) inside accumulate_tier; (c) add private seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 that runs before tier dispatch when commit_hashes? != false and umbrella? == false, computes hashes for tracked entries lacking committed hashes, and persists via HashStore.merge/2. Add Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false) that builds the world via the existing private build_world/3 and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: orchestrator_test.exs gains tests for (a) expand_implications wired per-layer; (b) post-concat dedup collapses subject+requirement duplicate impl entries into one api_boundary entry; (c) seed pass writes uncommitted hashes via merge/2; (d) gating respected (commit_hashes?: false skips seed); (e) dangling entries are not seeded.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.implication_invoked_per_layer, implication_amplification_dedup, silent_seed.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding.ex (S2; do not modify it here)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/hash_store.ex (S1; do not change merge/2 here)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (only to add hashes_for_seeding/3)
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT change Orchestrator.run/2's return shape (courtesy summary deferred per Q2).
- Do NOT introduce a run_with_metadata/2 wrapper.
- Do NOT add a finding code; the seed pass is silent on the seeding run.
- The post-concat dedup applies to api_boundary ONLY; impl/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs are untouched.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991.jsonl

Commit: d970d05
Stage branch: specled_-701.6/orchestrator-expand-implications-silent-seed
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-701.6 (branched off epic HEAD bf46a22 after rebase onto specled_-701.8 land)

Files touched (Allowed only):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (+267/-18)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (+32) — added hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false)
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs (+476/-1) — 14 new tests across 6 describe groups

Tests added:
- run/2 — expand_implications applied per-layer (3 tests)
  - subject impl entry amplifies into api_boundary tier on the same run
  - requirement-layer impl entry amplifies into api_boundary tier
  - implication-inferred dangling suppresses api_boundary dangling, keeps impl-tier dangling
- run/2 — post-concat dedup on api_boundary tier (2 tests)
  - subject + requirement both list the same impl MFA → exactly one api_boundary drift
  - implementation tier does NOT post-concat-dedup (subject impl_bindings still aggregates)
- run/2 — silent seed pass (4 tests)
  - writes api_boundary baseline for a never-seeded MFA and emits no drift
  - seed pass uses merge/2 (preserves sibling entry when drift halts the post-run refresh)
  - seeds bare-module entries under api_boundary (head-union) and implementation (full-union)
  - seeds implementation closure subject under subject.id
- run/2 — seed gating (2 tests)
  - commit_hashes?: false disables the seed pass
  - umbrella?: true skips the seed pass
- run/2 — dangling entries are not seeded (2 tests)
  - dangling MFA does not seed and surfaces a dangling finding
  - dangling MFA inside an implementation closure does not seed the subject
- run/2 — inferred? flag does not leak onto findings (1 test, property-style)

Each new test carries @tag spec: <id> for the requirement it advances.

Verification stubs flipped: NONE — .spec/** is Out of Scope for this ticket.
The execute: false stubs covering implication_invoked_per_layer +
implication_amplification_dedup + silent_seed remain false; S6/S9 will flip
them when the integration scenarios + spec doc updates land.

Spec validate (mix spec.validate) — pre-existing baseline was 7 errors / 13
warnings; current is 5 errors / 11 warnings. The 2-error / 2-warning drop is
exactly the new @tag spec: annotations advancing implication_amplification_dedup
+ silent_seed coverage. All remaining errors/warnings are S6/S7/S8 ticket
scope (dedup_realized_by_*, implication_drift_both_tiers integration scenario)
or S8-validator-induced realized_by_redundant_dup info-warnings on subjects
elsewhere in the repo — none are introduced by this commit.

Tests: mix test → 2 properties, 750 tests, 0 failures
Compile: mix compile --force --warnings-as-errors → clean

Summary: Wired EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 into Orchestrator.collect_bindings/1 at the per-layer extract_realized_by/1 site (subject layer + each requirement layer); inferred-by-implication api_boundary entries are tagged inferred?: true on their binding_ref so the api_boundary detector suppresses duplicate dangling findings. Added Enum.uniq_by(& &1.mfa) post-concat on the api_boundary tier flat list to collapse subject+requirement amplification. Added private seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 that runs before tier dispatch (gated by commit_hashes? != false and umbrella? == false), computes hashes for tracked entries lacking committed hashes across all five tiers (including bare-module head/full union envelopes for api_boundary/implementation), and persists via HashStore.merge/2. Dangling entries are not seeded. Added Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false) that builds the world via the existing private build_world/3 and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects.

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 3
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0

  Touched files match Allowed exactly:
    lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (+267/-18)
    lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (+32) — added hashes_for_seeding/3 only, no other surface modified
    test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs (+476/-1) — 14 new tests across 6 describe blocks
  No touches to effective_binding.ex / canonical.ex / api_boundary.ex / hash_store.ex / .spec/**.

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 0, passed: 0  (.spec/** is Out of Scope; the relevant verification stubs for implication_invoked_per_layer / implication_amplification_dedup / silent_seed / silent_seed_uses_merge / binding_ref_inferred_no_leak are correctly left at execute: false to be flipped by S6/S9)
- Requirements with passing tests: 5/5
    specled.realized_by.implication_invoked_per_layer — 3 tests (subject-layer amplification, requirement-layer amplification, dangling suppression on api_boundary tier)
    specled.realized_by.implication_amplification_dedup — 2 tests (subject+req both list same impl MFA collapses to one api_boundary drift; impl tier does NOT post-concat-dedup)
    specled.realized_by.silent_seed — 8 tests (api_boundary baseline, merge preservation, bare-module head/full union seeds, closure subject seed, commit_hashes?:false gate, umbrella?:true gate, dangling MFA not seeded, dangling closure not seeded)
    specled.realized_by.silent_seed_uses_merge — covered by 4 of the silent_seed tests via dual @tag spec lists
    specled.realized_by.binding_ref_inferred_no_leak — 1 property-style test asserting no finding map carries inferred? as atom or string key
- Intent-level scope concerns: none
    Run/2 return shape unchanged (still @spec run(map(), keyword()) :: [map()]; no run_with_metadata wrapper)
    Seed pass returns :ok and never contributes to the findings list — silent confirmed
    Post-concat dedup is api_boundary-only (Map.update!(bindings, :api_boundary, &Enum.uniq_by(&1, fn entry -> entry.mfa end)) at line 161); other tiers untouched
    commit_hashes?: false skips seed (line 108: `if commit_hashes? and not umbrella?`)
    umbrella?: true skips seed (same gate)
    Dangling entries are dropped in compute_seed_hashes/3 (api_boundary fallthrough returns acc; impl bare-module fallthrough returns inner_acc; impl closure subjects with no resolvable MFAs return %{} from Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3)
- Project verification: pass
    mix test → 2 properties, 750 tests, 0 failures
    mix compile (implicit) clean
    mix spec.check residual 11 findings + mix spec.validate residual 16 findings are pre-existing S6/S7/S8 territory (dedup_realized_by_* requirements, implication_drift_both_tiers integration scenario, redundant_dup info-warnings on subjects elsewhere). Verified by reading the residual list — every error names dedup_realized_by_* requirements (S8 ticket scope) or implication_drift_both_tiers (S6 ticket scope). None of the residuals trace to this commit.

Source-claim trace:
- EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 IS invoked per-layer in collect_bindings: subject layer at line 140 via expand_with_inferred(extract_realized_by(subject_meta(subject))); each requirement layer at line 145 inside Enum.map(reqs, ...).
- HashStore.merge/2 IS the persist call from seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 (line 403). HashStore.write/2 is reserved for refresh_and_commit_hashes/3 (line 120 → line 536).
- Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 builds via build_world/3 (line 124 of implementation.ex) and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects (subjects whose compute_hash returns {:error, ...} are silently dropped from the result map). seed_impl_closure also pre-filters bare modules out of impl_bindings before calling, so non-MFA closures never reach build_world.

Verdict: PASS

Notes for the auditor:
- The inferred? containment guarantee (binding_ref_inferred_no_leak) survives 701.6's amplification tagging cleanly. inferred?: true is added to binding_ref entries inside accumulate_tier (lines 218-222 for subject layer, lines 230-234 for requirement layer) — but ONLY when tier == :api_boundary (inferred_supported? gate at line 213). The api_boundary detector reads it via Map.get(binding, :inferred?, false) for dangling-finding suppression at api_boundary.ex:132 and 183 — never copied into a finding map. The leak-no-leak property test runs an assertion across ALL findings produced by a mixed authored+inferred run (drift + dangling) and confirms zero leakage; this is genuine mutation-resistance because dropping inferred-suppression guard would either re-emit the api_boundary dangling (which the test asserts MUST NOT exist) or the assertion structure would still catch a stray Map.put(finding, :inferred?, true).
- The implication_amplification_dedup mutation-resistance is solid: removing the post-concat uniq_by collapses the test "subject + requirement both list the same impl MFA" because both layers would emit a binding_ref and both would produce a drift finding (test asserts length(drifts) == 1). The test also asserts requirement_id == nil to confirm the FIRST-seen entry (subject layer) wins, which would fail if the dedup direction were reversed.
- The silent_seed mutation-resistance is solid: the merge-preservation test requires the seed pass to use merge/2 (not write/2) — replacing write/2 there clobbers the previously-committed drift_mfa, failing the assert HashStore.fetch == wrong line. The dangling-not-seeded tests directly assert get_in(store, [...]) == nil which fails if the seed pass forgets to bypass dangling.
- spec stubs for these requirements deliberately remain execute: false. S9 (specled_-701.10) is explicitly carved out to flip them; the implementer was correct not to touch them in S5.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit, orchestrated)
Session: eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/eeca2123-30e1-430c-90c1-08dd23adf991.jsonl

Reasoning: VERIFY reported PASS with full mechanical-scope cleanliness (3 files Allowed, 0 Out-of-Scope), 5/5 must-requirements with mutation-resistant tests (verifier explicitly traced what each mutation would break), all intent-level scope concerns met (run/2 shape unchanged; seed pass silent and gated on commit_hashes? + umbrella?; dedup api_boundary-only; dangling not seeded), and clean source-claim trace (expand_implications/1 invoked per-layer at lines 140/145, HashStore.merge/2 at line 403, Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 builds via build_world/3 with non-dangling filter). The inferred?-no-leak property test was specifically validated to survive 701.6's amplification tagging. Project verification: mix test 750/0; spec.check residuals are pre-existing for S6/S7/S8. Selective-audit fast path applied.
APPROVED. Merged into specled_-701/realized-by-tier-implication. Closing per orchestrator sign-off.

title: S5: Orchestrator wiring (expand_implications + silent seed)
